The '''Fitca system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in [[Urce sector/Legends|Urce Space]], a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] contained within the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fitca Prime]].

==Description==
The Fitca [[Star system/Legends|system]] was situated on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that ran through [[Urce sector/Legends|Urce Space]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

[[Fitca Prime]] was the primary [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the Fitca system.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==History==
During the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Fitca Prime and its system were [[Subjugation of Fitca|subjugated]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AIR" /><ref name="TCSWE" />

By [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the Fitca system was located within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="TEGtW" />
